case_title: SOMALIA FOLASHADE ET AL VS. THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by Plaintiff. Alexandra Drury, Esq. appearing for defendant, Fillmore Center. The Court orders this case dismissed without prejudice.
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-18-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2023 Continued To May-31-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Continued To Apr-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LLC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with final leave to amend to allege facts, not conclusions, in support of each element of each cause of action against the moving defendant. Plaintiffs shall have 30 days form notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Sara M. Rogers; Seyfarth Shaw LLP; 415-397-2823; appearing on behalf of defendant Fillmore Center Associates, LLC.

No other appearances. Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of any actionable cause of action against the moving defendant.

Order signed. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATE, LLC'S NOTICE OF DEMURRER AND DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Sara Rodgers, 415.397.2823 of Seyfarin Shaw LLP appearing via Zoom for Defendant Fillmore Center Associates, LLC.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATE, LLC'S NOTICE OF DEMURRER AND DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of any actionable cause of action against the moving defendant. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Continued To Oct-11-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on October 11, 2022. That department handles all landlord/tenant cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
